cells.rationale: Bounded single-snippet authoring, but the config-agnostic wording contract that the whole epic single-sources from is quality-sensitive, so keep opus at the model-default band.
Contract-touching change to a resolver at two non-shared entry points with fail-loud invariants to preserve and drift risk between sites, so route up to opus xhigh.
Atomic multi-file integration with byte-exact bakes, drift-gate extension, CI red-window and worktree reachability hazards demands the highest non-reserved band on opus.
